mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_record (user_id, experiment_id, target_animal, target_chemical, indicator_name, input_dosage, selected_model, predicted_value) VALUES (#{userId}, #{experimentId}, #{targetAnimal}, #{targetChemical}, #{indicatorName}, #{inputDosage}, #{selectedModel}, #{predictedValue})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simulation_record WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM experiment WHERE status = 'APPROVED'
